# =============================================================================
# DevOps Toolbox — Python Toolbox-Level Dependencies
# =============================================================================
# These packages are injected into Ansible's pipx virtualenv via:
#   pipx inject ansible --requirement dependencies/python-ansible-requirements.txt
#
# This makes them importable by Ansible modules and plugins at runtime.
#
# SCOPE: This file is for packages that support the TOOLBOX itself — things
# Ansible modules, inventory plugins, or connection plugins depend on
# universally. It is NOT for project-specific Python dependencies.
#
# Project-specific packages belong in a project's own requirements.txt,
# installed via postCreateCommand into a project-level virtual environment:
#   python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
#
# VERSIONING: Packages are pinned to a minimum compatible version (~=) rather
# than an exact version. This allows patch-level updates within a compatible
# release while preventing unexpected major/minor version jumps.
# Tighten a pin to == only if a specific version is known to be required.
# =============================================================================

# --- AWS / Route53 integration -----------------------------------------------
# Required by Ansible's AWS modules (ec2, s3, route53, etc.) and the AWS
# dynamic inventory plugin.
boto3~=1.42.84

# --- Kubernetes integration ---------------------------------------------------
# Required by the kubernetes.core collection for interacting with the k8s API
# (k8s, helm, k8s_info modules, etc.).
kubernetes~=35.0.0

# --- Network address manipulation ---------------------------------------------
# Required by Ansible's network-related filters and modules (e.g. ipaddr
# filter, network calculations in playbooks).
netaddr~=1.3.0

# --- Password hashing ---------------------------------------------------------
# Required by Ansible's 'user' module when creating users with hashed
# passwords (password_hash filter). Without this, password hashing tasks
# will fail with a missing dependency error.
passlib~=1.7.4
